member.name: M:HrManagementSystem.Features.GeographicalInformation.Countries.Controllers.V1.CountriesController.GetAll(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.remarks:
Returns active country records.
Permission required: Countries:View
member.response: Unauthorized — missing or invalid JWT token.

member.name: M:HrManagementSystem.Features.GeographicalInformation.Countries.Controllers.V1.CountriesController.GetByID(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get a single country by ID.
member.response:
Country found and returned.
{ "id" : 1, "nameAr" : "مصر", "nameEn" : "Egypt", "alpha2Code" : "EG", "alpha3Code" : "EGY", "phoneCode" : "20", "currencyCode" : "EGP", "states" : [], "createdOn" : "2024-01-15T10:30:00Z", "updatedOn" : null, "isDeleted" : false }
Country with the given ID does not exist.

member.name: M:HrManagementSystem.Features.GeographicalInformation.Countries.Controllers.V1.CountriesController.GetCountryWithStates(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get a country with its full states list populated.
member.remarks:
Use this endpoint to load the States dropdown after the user selects a country. The states array is fully populated with all non-deleted states.
Permission required: Countries:View
UI usage: On country select → call this endpoint → bind states to the State dropdown.
member.returns: CountryResponse with the states array fully populated.
member.response:
Country with states returned.
{ "id" : 1, "nameAr" : "مصر", "nameEn" : "Egypt", "alpha2Code" : "EG", "alpha3Code" : "EGY", "phoneCode" : "20", "currencyCode" : "EGP", "states" : [ { "id": 1, "nameAr": "القاهرة", "nameEn": "Cairo", "code": "CAI", "isDeleted": false }, { "id": 2, "nameAr": "الإسكندرية", "nameEn": "Alexandria", "code": "ALX", "isDeleted": false } ], "createdOn" : "2024-01-15T10:30:00Z", "updatedOn" : null, "isDeleted" : false }

member.name: M:HrManagementSystem.Features.GeographicalInformation.Countries.Controllers.V1.CountriesController.Add(HrManagementSystem.Features.GeographicalInformation.Countries.Contracts.CountryRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)

item.term: Optional for new records. Send null or 0.
2–100 chars · Arabic letters only · globally unique.
2–100 chars · English letters only · globally unique.
Exactly 2 English letters if provided · stored uppercase · globally unique. e.g. EG
Exactly 3 English letters if provided · stored uppercase · globally unique. e.g. EGY
Exactly 3 English letters if provided · stored uppercase. e.g. EGP

member.param:
CountryRequest body (JSON). The id property is optional for new records; send null, omit it, or send 0.
{ "id" : 0, "nameAr" : "مصر", "nameEn" : "Egypt", "alpha2Code" : "EG", "alpha3Code" : "EGY", "phoneCode" : "20", "currencyCode" : "EGP" }
member.response: Country created successfully. Returns the new country object.
Validation failed — check field constraints above.
nameAr, nameEn, alpha2Code, or alpha3Code already exists in another country.

member.name: M:HrManagementSystem.Features.GeographicalInformation.Countries.Controllers.V1.CountriesController.AddRange(System.Collections.Generic.List{HrManagementSystem.Features.GeographicalInformation.Countries.Contracts.CountryRequest},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Bulk insert multiple countries at once.
member.remarks:
Validates the full request before inserting. All items must have id omitted, null, or 0.
Permission required: Countries:Create
member.response: Empty list provided or validation failed on one of the items.
One or more names or codes already exist.

member.name: M:HrManagementSystem.Features.GeographicalInformation.Countries.Controllers.V1.CountriesController.Update(HrManagementSystem.Features.GeographicalInformation.Countries.Contracts.CountryRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.remarks:
Send the full object including the existing id. Same field rules as POST apply.
Permission required: Countries:Edit
member.param:
CountryRequest body. id must be the existing record's ID.
{ "id" : 1, "nameAr" : "مصر", "nameEn" : "Egypt", "alpha2Code" : "EG", "alpha3Code" : "EGY", "phoneCode" : "20", "currencyCode" : "EGP" }
member.response: Country updated successfully. Returns the updated country object.
Country with the given id not found.
Name or code conflict with another country.

member.name: M:HrManagementSystem.Features.GeographicalInformation.Countries.Controllers.V1.CountriesController.Delete(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Toggle soft-delete state of a country (delete or restore).
member.remarks:
Soft delete only — sets IsDeleted = true. Calling again restores the record.
Cannot delete if the country has active associated states. Soft-deleted states do not block delete.
Permission required: Countries:Delete
UI tip: On HTTP 400, show — "This country cannot be deleted because it has active associated states."
member.response: Country is referenced by one or more active states and cannot be deleted.

member.name: M:HrManagementSystem.Features.GeographicalInformation.Countries.Controllers.V1.CountriesController.GetCount(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get the total count of active (non-deleted) countries.
member.remarks:
Permission required: Countries:View
Use this to display a summary card at the top of the Countries page.
